/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/airun.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/airun.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/airun.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/airun.dir/src/openai_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/airun.dir/src/anthropic_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/airun.dir/src/safety_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/airun.dir/src/command_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/airun.dir/src/prompt_builder.cpp.o -o airun  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
